overall.description: First-person perspective in the video game Splatoon 3, looking up at a massive cyberpunk skyscraper with a vibrant animated LED facade displaying a stylized face with sunglasses. The surrounding buildings feature digital billboards and neon signage in a futuristic commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial plaza with giant digital facade

agents.ego_description: stationary, looking up at the animated digital display on the tower

entered.detail: tall building facade with giant animated display showing a stylized face with sunglasses in purple and yellow tones
building covered with multiple digital advertisements and glowing signage
red-framed building with large digital screen and vertical neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera looks up from street level at a massive cyberpunk skyscraper dominated by a vibrant LED facade displaying an animated face. The surrounding buildings are covered in digital billboards and neon signs, creating a vivid artificial lighting environment. The scene is devoid of pedestrians, focusing entirely on the architectural spectacle.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial plaza with giant digital facade

events.description: main LED facade shifts from warm purple-yellow tones to cool green-cyan color palette

agents.ego_description: continues observing the color-changing digital display

segments.scene_description: The LED facade transitions to a cool green and cyan color scheme, dramatically altering the lighting atmosphere of the scene. The digital billboards on surrounding buildings continue to cycle through advertisements, maintaining the vibrant cyberpunk aesthetic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous upward gaze at a massive cyberpunk skyscraper as the surrounding artificial lighting shifts in tone. It begins at street level, looking up at a towering structure dominated by a vibrant LED facade displaying an animated face amidst a sea of digital billboards and neon signs. As the camera maintains its focus on the architectural spectacle, the vivid colors of the district begin to fluctuate. The scene then transforms as the LED facade transitions into a cool green and cyan color scheme, dramatically altering the atmospheric lighting of the entire commercial district. This shift in hue washes over the surrounding buildings while the nearby digital advertisements continue to cycle, maintaining the immersive cyberpunk aesthetic.
